title: Slovakian Apple Crumble
description: A delicious dessert made with caramelized apples and a crunchy Slovakian crumble topping, perfect for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Apples
ingredients.notes: mix of Granny Smith and Gala

instructions: Grease a 9x9-inch baking dish with olive oil.
Arrange the sliced apples in the prepared baking dish.
Top the apples with caramelized apples and Slovakian crumble.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
